No Poverty.reason: The course objective to achieve '均富' (equal wealth) provides a tenuous, inferred link to reducing poverty and ensuring equal economic resources, aligning with Target 1.b.
evidence: 達成發展國民經濟與均富的目標

Zero Hunger.reason: No evidence related to food security, nutrition, or sustainable agriculture was found in the course description.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No evidence related to health, well-being, disease prevention, or healthcare was found in the course description.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it directly provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops professional knowledge and practical skills for employment (Target 4.4).
evidence: 使學生了解證券交易中基本之證券法規範相關概念

Gender Equality.reason: No evidence related to gender equality, women's empowerment, or discrimination was found in the course description.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No evidence related to water resources, sanitation, or pollution was found in the course description.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No evidence related to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency was found in the course description.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course explicitly aims 'to develop the national economy' (Target 8.1) and focuses on capital markets, strengthening financial institutions, and expanding financial services (Target 8.10).
evidence: 證券交易法為我國資本市場的基本法律規範

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course details the legal infrastructure of capital markets, which facilitates financing transactions and increases access to financial services for enterprises (Target 9.3).
evidence: 規定各類融資交易的方式
有價證券之募集、發行、私募與買賣

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course aims for '均富' (equal wealth) and focuses on regulating financial markets and preventing illicit activities, aligning with Target 10.5.
evidence: 規範證券交易所與櫃買中心等公開市場的交易與遊戲規則

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No evidence related to urban development, housing, transport, or community planning was found in the course description.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: Discussions on corporate governance and information disclosure are foundational for integrating sustainability information into company reporting (Target 12.6).
evidence: 資訊揭露之規範與不實責任

Climate Action.reason: No evidence related to climate change, mitigation, or adaptation was found in the course description.

Life Below Water.reason: No evidence related to marine ecosystems, ocean health, or aquatic resources was found in the course description.

Life on Land.reason: No evidence related to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or land management was found in the course description.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course is fundamentally about promoting the rule of law (Target 16.3), ensuring access to justice for investors, and building transparent institutions by combating financial crimes (Target 16.6).
evidence: 保障投資人於被詐害時法律救濟之權利

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course's comparison of Taiwan and US capital market regulations contributes to policy coherence and understanding global macroeconomic stability (Target 17.13).
evidence: 介紹我國與美國資本市場上的證券發行和交易相關的證券法規範
